title: 🔒 File / Folder Protector
sub: Manage files and folders protected from AI agent edits. Hardcoded rules = permanent baseline. Custom rules = your own additions.
add_hint: Add a file/folder to protect from agent modification.
add_tip: Path to protect from AI agent modification. Suffix or basename match depending on type.
type_tip: Match type: Suffix = path ends with the pattern; Basename = exact filename only.
cat_tip: Categorize the rule to ease filtering and management.
add_btn_tip: Save a new rule to the dynamic protector registry (hot-reload). Matching files/folders are denied to AI agents.
test_hint: Check whether a path is protected.
test_tip: Path to check whether it's protected by an active rule.
test_btn_tip: Simulate whether this path would be blocked for AI agents. Read-only — no state change.
protected: 🔒 PROTECTED — this file is shielded from agents
not_protected: ⚠️ NOT PROTECTED — agents can touch this file
